revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:阿蘇神社 (羽島市)]]
{{Source citation|date=2015th year 3月15日 (日) 08:36 (UTC)|qq=}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |Name=Aso Shrine |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}|image=File:Aso shrine, Hashima, 2015.jpg |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}|location={{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|Hashima, Gifu|en|Hashima, Gifu|qid=Q819595|lt=Hashima City|1=Hashima, Gifu}}小熊町西小熊1577-1 |Coordinates={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|21|01.0|N|136|41|43.0|E|scale:25000|qq=}} |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}|deity={{ill|Aso Tsuhiko-no-mikoto|ja|健磐龍命|lt=Aso-tsuhiko-no-Mikoto|1=Takeiwatatsu-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=健磐龍命|4=fr|5=Takeiwatatsu-no-Mikoto|6=zh|7=健磐龍命|8=ko|9=다케이와타쓰노미코토|lt_ja=阿蘇都彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aso Tsuhiko-no-mikoto|qq=}} |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}|type=Former Village Shrine (旧村社) |Establishment=Unknown |Main Hall= |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}|festival= |Sacred Rites= |prefecture={{ill|Hashima|qid=Q819595|1=Hashima, Gifu}} |coordinates={{Coord|35.350278|N|136.695278|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Aso Shrine''' (阿蘇神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|Hashima, Gifu|en|Hashima, Gifu|qid=Q819595|lt=Hashima City|1=Hashima, Gifu}}. It serves as the {{ill|Ubusunagami|en|Ubusunagami|qid=Q1392097|lt=Ubusunagami|1=Ubusunagami}} of the Oguma area (formerly part of {{ill|Hashima District, Gifu|en|Hashima District, Gifu|qid=Q615068|lt=Hashima District|1=Hashima District, Gifu}} and {{ill|Oguma Village|ja|小熊村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguma Village|1=Oguma|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11462768}}) along the {{ill|Minoji|en|Minoji|qid=Q3315566|lt=Minoji|1=Minoji}}, and is also known as "Okuma Ichinomiya". == Enshrined Deity == * {{ill|Aso Tsuhiko-no-mikoto|ja|健磐龍命|lt=Aso-tsuhiko-no-Mikoto|1=Takeiwatatsu-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=健磐龍命|4=fr|5=Takeiwatatsu-no-Mikoto|6=zh|7=健磐龍命|8=ko|9=다케이와타쓰노미코토|lt_ja=阿蘇都彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aso Tsuhiko-no-mikoto|qq=}} of the {{ill|Aso Shrine|en|Aso Shrine|qid=Q715639|lt=Aso Shrine|1=Aso Shrine}} in {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}. == History == The founding period is unknown. According to one theory, when the {{ill|Ōhashi clan|ja|大橋氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōhashi clan|1=Ōhashi clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q30926075}} relocated to this area, they established a branch enshrinement ({{ill|Bunrei|en|Bunrei|qid=Q195793|lt=Branch enshrined|1=Bunrei}}) from the Aso Shrine of {{ill|Higo Province|en|Higo Province|qid=Q259705|lt=Higo Province|1=Higo Province}}. == Other == Due to the great flood of the {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 14th year ({{ill|1586|en|1586|qid=Q6739|lt=1586|1=1586}}) of the {{ill|Kiso River|en|Kiso River|qid=Q779607|lt=Kiso River|1=Kiso River}}, the region was changed from {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|qid=Q514506|lt=Owari Province|1=Owari Province}}{{ill|Haguri District|en|Haguri District|qid=Q1032507|lt=Haguri District|1=Haguri District}} to {{ill|Mino Province|en|Mino Province|qid=Q864156|lt=Mino Province|1=Mino Province}}{{ill|Haguri District|ja|羽栗郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haguri District|1=Haguri district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11610214}}. From this, it is speculated that the Ōhashi clan who founded Aso Shrine were descendants of the Owari Ōhashi clan of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 伊勢平氏}} (descendants of {{ill|Taira no Sadayoshi|en|Taira no Sadayoshi|qid=Q7676363|lt=Taira Sadanobu|1=Taira no Sadayoshi}}). == Transportation == * Alight at the "Nishi-Okuma" bus stop on the {{ill|Hashima City Community Bus|ja|羽島市コミュニティバス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hashima City Community Bus|1=Hashima City Community Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11610099}} Blue Bus.
{{shinto-stub|qq=}} {{Aso Faith|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|阿蘇神社 (羽島市)|version=70965710|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:阿蘇神社 (羽島市)]] [[ja:阿蘇神社]]
